Hero.title: Build Your Next
Hero.subtitle: Quality electronics components for makers and professionals. Free pickup available in Kampala.

Home.description: Discover high-quality IoT components, microcontrollers, sensors, and development boards at competitive prices. Uganda's trusted source for electronics.
Home.ogDescription: Discover high-quality IoT components at competitive prices. Shop microcontrollers, sensors, and development boards.

highQuality.title: Genuine Products
highQuality.description: Authentic components from trusted brands like Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and Espressif

bestPrices.title: Best Prices in Uganda
bestPrices.description: Competitive pricing on all our IoT and electronics products

fastDelivery.title: Fast Local Delivery
fastDelivery.description: Quick delivery across Kampala and upcountry locations

Product.addedToCartDescription: {name} has been added to your cart
Product.errorAddToCart: Failed to add item to cart

shipping.question: What are your shipping options?
shipping.answer: We offer standard delivery within Kampala (1-2 days), upcountry delivery (2-5 days), and express same-day delivery for Kampala orders placed before 2 PM. Free pickup is available at our Ntinda location.

returns.question: What is your return policy?
returns.answer: We accept returns within 7 days for defective or incorrect items. Components must be unused and in original packaging. Contact our support team to initiate a return.

tracking.question: How can I track my order?
tracking.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive an SMS and email with tracking information. You can also view your order status by logging into your account.

international.question: Do you offer wholesale or bulk orders?
international.answer: Yes! We offer discounted pricing for bulk orders. Contact us at sales@iothub.ug for wholesale inquiries and custom component sourcing.

Common.siteDescription: Shop the best IoT components at {siteName}. Quality microcontrollers, sensors, and electronics for your projects.

about.title: About Us
about.description: IoT Hub Uganda is your trusted source for quality IoT components and electronics in Uganda. We provide genuine products from leading brands at competitive prices.
about.missionText: To make quality electronics accessible to makers, students, and professionals across Uganda. We believe everyone should have access to the tools they need to bring their ideas to life.

features.prices: Competitive pricing with no hidden fees

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have questions? We're here to help. Reach out to our team for support, inquiries, or wholesale orders.
